codeFiles.name: present.go
codeFiles.code:
package serverless

const Outline = `
Good Lambda habits:

  • Handler reads configuration from env populated by IaC (ARN of secret, not value)
  • At cold start: fetch secret once, cache in /tmp if allowed by threat model
  • IAM role: least privilege — invoke one queue, read one parameter
  • Idempotency key from event id for downstream writes
  • Timeout and memory sized from p99 measurements, not defaults
`

codeFiles.name: bad.go
codeFiles.code:
package serverless

const BadOutline = `
Anti-pattern handler (illustrative):

  const apiKey = "sk-live-1234567890" // committed to repo / env var in console screenshot
  http.Get("https://api.vendor.com/charge?key=" + apiKey)

Also common:
  • 15-minute timeout with synchronous calls to flaky HTTP APIs
  • Full VPC attachment for a function that only needs S3 — cold starts explode
`
